items.caption: A collage of three distinct photographs, each capturing a different scene. the top photo shows a lottery ticket dispenser with various lottery tickets displayed, suggesting a focus on winning big. the middle photo features a person's hand holding a lottery ticket, reinforcing the theme of luck and chance. the bottom photo depicts a parking lot in front of a shopping center, with a clear sky and a mountain range in the background, which might be related to the lottery's location or the player's destination. the text "20 cities in 20 days" and "is san tan valley a lucky lottery spot?" hint at a travel or location-based lottery promotion.
